content.text:
{
  "dimension": "perceptual-accuracy",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach makes multiple specific, timely reads that change the conversation. Turn 4 names the deflection ('You're asking me to answer it for you') — a read of the stance, not just the content. Turn 6 names the linguistic-caveat pattern precisely: 'You keep coming back to the question right when the want gets real' — this is the rush-away-from-want signature named at the exact moment it happens. Turn 8 reads the 'but' as the talk-out-of-it move and names it ('Yeah. You are. Stay with the sad for a second. Before the but.'). Turn 10 reads the significance of what was just said ('Yeah, it is. And you said it anyway.') and inquires into the somatic/energetic shift. Turn 12 distinguishes the surface question from the real one underneath. Reads consistently precede questions and are specific to AoA territory (caveat, want-underneath, deflection-to-coach).",
  "evidence_turns": [4, 6, 8, 10, 12],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Opens with a want-question but no read named yet."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reads the deflection — names that client is outsourcing the verdict — before asking the next question."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Explicit linguistic-caveat read: names the pattern of returning to the question whenever the want gets real. Timed precisely to the moment."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reads the 'but' / talk-out-of-it move and instructs staying with the sad before it."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reads the significance of what just landed ('you said it anyway') and inquires into the felt experience of having it in the room."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reads the surface vs. real question — distinguishes the said from the shown."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["linguistic-caveat", "find-the-want-behind-the-should", "the-want"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["childhood-imprinting"],
  "notes": "Coach did not surface the inherited 'selfish' label / childhood imprinting, but that is a content/territory miss, not a reads miss. Reads themselves are visible, specific, and well-timed."
}
